name: Turk Prysmian Kablo ve Sistemleri Anonim Sirketi
summary: T√É¬ºrk Prysmian Kablo ve Sistemleri Anonim Sirketi engages in the manufacture, import, export, and trading of cables, conductors, machinery, apparatus, tools and equipment, and spare parts and accessories for energy and telecommunication industries worldwide. The company offers a range of energy cables, including insulated low, medium, and high voltage, as well as building cables; and building, low voltage, and fire resistant cables. It also provides various telecom solutions, such as optical fiber cables and accessories, copper and telephone cables, building and antenna cables, signal and control cables, data center cables, and structured cabling solutions, as well as multimedia solutions comprising industrial communication and coaxial cables, and studio/broadcast and mobile networks solutions. In addition, the company offers nuclear, photovoltaic, ship, rolling stock, railway, airport and elevator runway, control, rubber insulated, and automotive cables. Further, it provides integrated solutions and services for downhole technology, SURF, and core cables. The company offers its products primarily under the Prysmian and Draka brands. The company was formerly known as Turk Pirelli Kablo ve Sistemleri A.S. and changed its name to T√É¬ºrk Prysmian Kablo ve Sistemleri Anonim Sirketi in September 2005. The company was founded in 1964 and is headquartered in Mudanya, Turkey. T√É¬ºrk Prysmian Kablo ve Sistemleri Anonim Sirketi is a subsidiary of Draka Holding B.V.
